docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF TRAM NGUYEN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSEPH TAYLOR. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, TRAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, JOSEPH $935.84 PRINCIPAL, $127.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,063.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $935.84 FILED BY NGUYEN, TRAM AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
